text.title: BA Methodologies Detail Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the methodologies-detail methodology end-to-end.

step.name: classify-ask
step.action: Determine which of the 12 frameworks the ask requires.

step.name: select-frameworks
step.action: Lock the framework set; document why each.

step.name: emit-deliverables
step.action: Generate template skeletons; assign owners + due.

step.name: fill-and-review
step.action: Per-framework SME fills; peer review against checklist.

step.name: publish
step.action: Commit to version control; link from KA routing record.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
